name: core
description: Operating system for building with AI — input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, C3c token-compression bundle (RTK native-tool whitelist + MCP output compression), opt-in local metric telemetry, and v1.9 identity stamping (git name + gh login + os fingerprint in manifest when telemetry is on).

profile.title: Enforcement profile
profile.description: individual = warn-only, telemetry off. project = warn-only, telemetry on (default). company = HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on.
